title: Degraded Navigation Assurance Case
mission_context: Autonomous route execution under degraded navigation confidence.

claims.statement: The autonomy runtime remains bounded under degraded navigation confidence.
claims.argument: A runtime safety gate detects active navigation-confidence degradation and forces safe-hold with emergency authority state before nominal route execution continues.

hazards.title: Navigation confidence loss
hazards.description: Autonomy may continue nominal route execution after navigation confidence falls below the mission threshold.

controls.name: Navigation confidence safety gate
controls.description: Restricts nominal autonomy when navigation-confidence telemetry satisfies the degraded-navigation trigger condition.

mitigations.description: Force safe-hold and require emergency authority state while navigation confidence is degraded.

evidence.description: Acceptance run evidence showing safe-hold under active degraded-navigation telemetry.

verification_criteria.statement: Safe-hold is emitted when navigation confidence is below the mission threshold.
verification_criteria.verification_method: Runtime scenario execution with deterministic evidence bundle hashing.
